name: Mole Sauce+
recipeIngredient: 2 Dried New Mexican red chilies or 2 teaspoons red pepper flakes
1 oz Bittersweet chocolate or 1/4 cup semisweet chocolate chips
recipeInstructions:
1. If using dried chilies, remove the seeds and stems.
2. Tear chili peppers into chunks and place in food processor or blender. Alternatively, measure red pepper flakes.
3. Drain and chop 4 canned tomatoes, reserving remaining tomatoes and juice to add later to the chili.
4. Place chopped tomatoes in food processor or blender.
5. Add onion, garlic, sesame seeds, almonds, raisins, ground cloves, cinnamon, and coriander. Pulse on and off until ingredients are finely chopped.
6. Add water. Process until mixture is smooth.
7. Heat oil in saucepan.
8. Add pureed mixture. Cook, stirring often, for 10 minutes.
9. Add chicken broth and chocolate. Cook over medium-low heat, stirring occasionally, for 15 minutes.
